entries.name: 【Autograph Session】Reveal of the Coyo Signature!【#Coyote / #KemoV】
entries.description:
Autograph Session Rules:
1) I can only write the names for superchats submitted between July 23rd 8:00pm-8:30pm PST/ July 24th 12:00pm-12:30pm JST (I'm sorry, superchats sent beforehand or after will not be eligible!)
2) I will write the name that you have set for your youtube account (name that shows up on chat). And I will not be able to write any names that may deem as offensive, inappropriate, or something that I may be uncomfortable with writing.
3) Any superchat amount (no minimum) is ok! It will be eligible as long as it follows the above rules.

*Cheki = polaroid photo
To save the cheki, you can screenshot it from the stream. If you cannot watch the stream in realtime, when I am writing your cheki, the archive will be available so you will still have access!

Thank you for your understanding! I am looking forward to the autograph session!!

▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin)
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾

▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△

entries.name: *POSTPONED*【10K Subscriber Celebration!】THANK YOU COYODACHI FOR 10K!【#Coyote / #KemoV】
entries.description:

entries.name: 【Tutorial】Vtuber Idol Step Dance Lesson【#Coyote / #KemoV】
entries.description:
Clip of my idol step dance tutorial / lesson from the 3d debut stream! I hope this can be useful for anyone looking to try learning idol step! Full Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BZHjmV3qFLc&t=1s

*This is not mirrored but you can learn from the video the same as if it is mirrored since the movement for both left and right are the same! :)
*My hands were mostly open during the tutorial but the idol step should be done with your hands in the shape of a fist (relaxed, not too tightly gripped).

Coyo's first English collab! Today's collab guest is Shizukou and we will be playing, Escape Simulator!

Shizukou
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/c/Shizukou
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Shizukougames

Coyote (Coyo)
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCabMjG8p6G5xLkPJgEoTnDg
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV

▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
Opening screen Illustrator/animator: @kemopuffin
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
